hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"⚠️ Context is about to be compacted. BEFORE doing anything else, write a comprehensive resume note to .claude/session_summary.md that the user can read in their next session to skip replaying this conversation.

Include:
(1) Current state of the project — what works, what is being built.
(2) Files recently modified with one-line descriptions.
(3) Key architectural decisions made with rationale.
(4) What was just completed.
(5) What is queued or in-progress.
(6) Any TODOs or open questions.

Keep it under 400 words. OVERWRITE the file (do not append)."}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Asking Claude to write session_summary.md before compaction...

hooks.command: SUMMARY="$(pwd)/.claude/session_summary.md"; if [ -f "$SUMMARY" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':'📋 RESUME FROM PREVIOUS SESSION (read this first, then continue work):\n\n'+open(sys.argv[1]).read()}}))" "$SUMMARY"; fi
